pi_items.source: Task description and metadata both specify instrument name as 'SYNTH101'. NinjaTrader allows custom instrument names.
File does not exist in the provided codebase. setup_task.ps1 (which should create this file) is referenced in task.json hooks but does not exist. Cannot verify actual location or existence.

pi_items.verified_value: yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume (format verified from NinjaTrader documentation and examples in codebase)
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader official documentation specifies daily OHLCV format as 'yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume'. AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt, SPY.Last.txt in codebase follow this exact format.
Task description explicitly states: 'Open a new Chart for SYNTH101 with a Daily interval.' Metadata also specifies 'expected_interval': 'Daily'.

NinjaTrader official support documentation (Workspaces Folder forum post) confirms standard location. URL: https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/platform-technical-support-aa/1226427-workspaces-folder

pi_items.verified_value: Task description explicitly states 'You have been provided with a daily data file for a new synthetic instrument.' indicating the data is for a synthetic (not real-world stock) instrument.
pi_items.source: Task description line: 'You have been provided with a daily data file for a new synthetic instrument.'

pi_items.verified_value: NinjaTrader convention is InstrumentName.Last.txt or InstrumentName.Bid.txt or InstrumentName.Ask.txt
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/importing.htm) states: 'the name of the text file to be imported must be the NinjaTrader instrument name followed by a period and Last, Bid, or Ask depending on the data type. For example: MSFT.Last.txt'. The metadata value 'SYNTH101.txt' does not follow this convention.

pi_items.metadata_value: setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are referenced in task.json hooks
pi_items.source: Task.json references pre_task hook: 'C:\workspace\tasks\import_custom_historical_data\setup_task.ps1' and post_task hook: 'C:\workspace\tasks\import_custom_historical_data\export_result.ps1'. Directory listing shows only task.json, verifier.py, and __pycache__.

pi_items.verified_value: File does not exist in codebase repository
pi_items.source: Search of benchmarks/cua_world/environments/ninja_trader_env/data/ directory shows only: AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt, SPY.Last.txt, and NinjaTrader.Install.V8.msi. No SYNTH101.txt file found.

pi_items.metadata_value: Real Yahoo Finance data available for AAPL, MSFT, SPY
pi_items.verified_value: AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt, SPY.Last.txt each contain 502 trading days of real historical OHLCV data from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31
pi_items.source: File inspection: wc -l shows exactly 502 lines per file; date range verified by checking first and last records

privileged_info_summary: The task requires importing a synthetic data file named SYNTH101.txt for a custom trading instrument into NinjaTrader 8 using the Daily interval. The metadata correctly specifies the standard NinjaTrader workspaces directory (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces) and the data format (yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume). However, critical task infrastructure is missing: (1) the SYNTH101.txt data file does not exist in the codebase, (2) the setup_task.ps1 script that should prepare this file is referenced but not provided, (3) the export_result.ps1 script is also missing. Additionally, the filename 'SYNTH101.txt' contradicts NinjaTrader's documented naming convention which requires format 'InstrumentName.Last.txt' (should be 'SYNTH101.Last.txt'). The codebase contains real Yahoo Finance data files (AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt, SPY.Last.txt) with 502 trading days each, but no synthetic SYNTH101 data.
